report.summary: Cycle-close Apr 1 v10: 628 published slugs (down 3 from v9 recount — likely comment-line matches). 109 published slugs still missing page.tsx files. 51 uncommitted files (15 modified, 36 untracked). All 6 API routes intact with proper caching. 1 low-risk use-client+metadata pattern detected (sui-hashi — non-exported, won't break build). TS errors confined to structured-data.examples.ts (non-blocking, ignoreBuildErrors=true). PUBLISH_QUEUE empty. Deploy still blocked on commit+push.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 628 published slugs audited — 109 slugs reference pages without page.tsx (same as prior cycles, mostly learn/ guides not yet scaffolded)
5 recently changed learn pages verified: all have valid metadata exports, no use-client conflicts
1 low-risk finding: src/app/learn/sui-hashi-bitcoin-defi-guide/page.tsx has 'use client' + `const metadata` (not exported, so no build break — but dead code)
53 learn pages use 'use client' directive — no new conflicts introduced this cycle
TypeScript errors limited to structured-data.examples.ts (template literal syntax) — non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors=true in next.config
tools/stablecoin-yield-tracker refactored (563-line net reduction) — metadata intact

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes present: prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields
Caching audit: all routes implement Cache-Control with s-maxage + stale-while-revalidate pattern
prices: 60s TTL, fear-greed: 600s TTL, trending: 300s TTL, market-metrics: 60s TTL, market-dominance: 300s TTL, defi-yields: dynamic TTL
All routes have fallback data patterns (FALLBACK_DATA or stale cache ladder)
Upstream API health could not be verified (egress blocked to coingecko/llama) — code-level checks pass
health endpoint available at /api/health with rate limiting

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest commit: 3b2dd28 — 'fix: remove use client from 4 learn pages that export metadata (fixes Vercel build)'
51 uncommitted files in working tree (15 modified tracked, 36 untracked — mostly OG SVGs and new reports)
Build config intact: standalone output, 8GB memory, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, ignoreBuildErrors=true
Deploy blocked: uncommitted changes need commit+push before next Vercel production deploy
No live site verification possible (egress blocked) — recommend manual Vercel dashboard check
PUBLISH_QUEUE is empty — all queued pages promoted as of 2026-04-01

sections.title: Project Manager
items: This cycle: 8 learn guide pages modified (content/SEO improvements), 1 tool page refactored, 5 new OG images created, 2 skill files updated
Publish queue fully drained — 0 pages remaining in queue
20 learn guides staged in Degen0x working directory (not yet merged to cryptodegen)
Carry-over blockers: (1) commit+push 51 uncommitted files, (2) scaffold 109 missing page.tsx files for published slugs, (3) fix slug mismatch for crypto-wallet-security-token-approvals-guide
No new sprints cut since commit 3b2dd28 — next deploy requires a commit cycle
Recommend: batch commit current changes, then Vercel redeploy to ship learn guide improvements and new OG images
